description: Style Note You can see the smooth blend of style and comfort in this remanika creation. This bright red top can be worn with slim Fit black trousers and flat pumps for an elegant look. Accessorise subtly for a sharp and smart look. Product Details Red top, has a broad fold over collar with a loop in front to give a bow type detail, has elastication at the back near the hip, one pocket on either side with an elasticated opening and elastication at the sides under the pockets Material and Care Polyester Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and tumble dry low Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
